## Echo safeguards

- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, databases, private memory, or generated user data committed
- [ ] Local-only mode still works
- [ ] No silent paid-provider call introduced
- [ ] No fabricated tool/source/action success
- [ ] Atlas's internal retrieval/ranking mechanics remain unrendered, and Echo's own `REASONING:`/`ANSWER:` envelope stayed visible (not suppressed)
- [ ] Unrelated behavior was not changed
